entityresolution.matchingworkflow.output: A list of `OutputAttribute` objects, each of which have the fields `Name` and `Hashed`. Each of these objects selects a column to be included in the output table, and whether the values of the column should be hashed.

entityresolution.matchingworkflow.output.Description: Normalizes the attributes defined in the schema in the input data. For example, if an attribute has an `AttributeType` of `PHONE_NUMBER`, and the data in the input table is in a format of 1234567890, AWS Entity Resolution will normalize this field in the output to (123)-456-7890.
Customer KMS ARN for encryption at rest. If not provided, system will use an AWS Entity Resolution managed KMS key.

A list of `OutputAttribute` objects, each of which have the fields `Name` and `Hashed`. Each of these objects selects a column to be included in the output table, and whether the values of the column should be hashed.
The S3 path to which AWS Entity Resolution will write the output table.
